headline: Beckman Coulter Diagnostics Earns CE Mark for New Assay Delivering Bacterial vs. Viral Infection Results in Approximately 20 Minutes
summary: Beckman Coulter Diagnostics, a Danaher company and global leader in clinical diagnostics, today announced it has received CE 2797 mark under IVDR for the Access MeMed BV assay, enabling broad availability of a high-throughput host‑response test that helps clinicians differentiate between bacterial and viral infections in approximately 20 minutes.

content.title: Beckman Coulter Diagnostics Earns CE Mark for New Assay Delivering Bacterial vs. Viral Infection Results in Approximately 20 Minutes
content.summary: Beckman Coulter Diagnostics, a Danaher company and global leader in clinical diagnostics, today announced it has received CE 2797 mark under IVDR for the Access MeMed BV assay, enabling broad availability of a high-throughput host‑response test that helps clinicians differentiate between bacterial and viral infections in approximately 20 minutes.

thumbnail.caption: A global leader in advanced diagnostics, Beckman Coulter has challenged convention to elevate the diagnostic laboratory’s role in improving patient health for more than 80 years. (PRNewsfoto/Beckman Coulter Diagnostics)

headline: Cell Therapy Technology Market Research and Global Forecast Report 2025-2030: Rising Chronic Disease Burden and CRISPR-Driven Gene Editing Innovations Driving Growth
summary: The global cell therapy technologies market is set to grow from USD 4.41 billion in 2025 to USD 7.91 billion by 2030, achieving a CAGR of 12.4%. Key growth drivers include advancements in regenerative medicine, increasing chronic disease prevalence, robust R&D investments, and innovations in gene editing, particularly CRISPR.
